ast: string_agg(s)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                                            |
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| s      | Column(StringColumn[abc, def, opq, xyz])                                        |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: StringColumn[abcopq, defxyz], validity: [0b______11] } |
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: string_agg(s)
sort_descs: [AggregateFunctionSortDesc { index: Offset(0), is_reuse_index: true, data_type: String, nulls_first: false, asc: false }]
evaluation (internal):

| Column | Data                                                                            |
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| s      | Column(StringColumn[abc, def, opq, xyz])                                        |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: StringColumn[opqabc, xyzdef], validity: [0b______11] } |
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


error: string_agg does not support type 'Null'

ast: string_agg(s_null)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                                               |
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| s_null | Column(NullableColumn { column: StringColumn[a, , c, d], validity: [0b____1101] }) |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: StringColumn[ac, d], validity: [0b______11] }             |
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: string_agg(s_all_null)
evaluation (internal):
+------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column     | Data                                                                                |
+------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| s_all_null | Column(NullableColumn { column: StringColumn[a, b, c, d], validity: [0b____0000] }) |
| Output     | NullableColumn { column: StringColumn[, ], validity: [0b______00] }                 |
+------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: string_agg(s, '|')
evaluation (internal):
+--------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                                              |
+--------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| s      | Column(StringColumn[abc, def, opq, xyz])                                          |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: StringColumn[abc|opq, def|xyz], validity: [0b______11] } |
+--------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: string_agg(a, '|')
evaluation (internal):
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                                      |
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1]))                                               |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: StringColumn[4|2, 3|1], validity: [0b______11] } |
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------+

ast: string_agg(parse_json(json))
evaluation (internal):

| Column | Data                                                                                         |

| json   | Column(StringColumn[{"k":1}, {"k":2}, {"k":1}, null])                                        |

+--------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


error: string_agg does not support type 'Null'

ast: string_agg(s_null, '-')
evaluation (internal):
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                                               |
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| s_null | Column(NullableColumn { column: StringColumn[a, , c, d], validity: [0b____1101] }) |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: StringColumn[a-c, d], validity: [0b______11] }            |
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: group_concat(s)
sort_descs: [AggregateFunctionSortDesc { index: Offset(0), is_reuse_index: true, data_type: String, nulls_first: false, asc: false }]
evaluation (internal):

| Column | Data                                                                            |
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| s      | Column(StringColumn[abc, def, opq, xyz])                                        |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: StringColumn[opqabc, xyzdef], validity: [0b______11] } |
